## Checklist

- [ ] I have the right to contribute this content under the Apache License 2.0.
- [ ] I have checked `OPEN_SOURCE_PATENT_REVIEW.md` for patent-disclosure risk.
- [ ] This change does not disclose unfiled inventions unless public release is intentional and permitted.
- [ ] This change does not include real recordings, transcripts, voiceprint templates, event logs, speaker profiles, screening records, safety-case records, or other personal data.
- [ ] This change does not include API keys, passwords, SSH keys, tokens, private TLS keys, private deployment addresses, or runtime logs.
- [ ] Third-party code, models, media, or assets are compatible with their licenses and are attributed where needed.
- [ ] Safety, privacy, medical, legal-evidence, and emergency-response boundaries remain accurate.

## Notes For Maintainers

If this change affects detection algorithms, acoustic filtering, voiceprint recognition, speaker profiles, mental-health screening, active-intervention hardware, deployment topology, or evaluation methods, confirm that public disclosure is intended before merging.
